section.name: Alpha Notice
section.p: ⚠ This plugin is in early-phase development (alpha). APIs, configuration schemas, HST component interfaces, and JCR node types are subject to change without notice between releases. Do not treat any aspect of this plugin as stable until a non-SNAPSHOT version is published to Bloomreach Forge.

tr.td: Widget picker document. Overrides request widgetId.
Static PID fallback for product-context widgets.
Maximum number of products to return.
Product-detail band name when band mode is used.

section.name: v1 vs v2 Pathways
section.p: API version selection is automatic. When authKey is absent the component calls the v1 recommendations flow through discoverySearchAPI. When authKey is present it switches to the v2 Pathways API through discoveryPathwaysAPI.

section.name: PDP band mode
section.p: In dataSource=productDetailBand mode, the recommendations component reads the current product PID from a sibling DiscoveryProductDetailComponent using the matching band value. This is the intended pattern for PDP "similar items" carousels.

section.name: Dynamic widget resolution
section.p: If no widget ID is provided through the document picker or request, the component can resolve an enabled widget dynamically through DiscoveryWidgetService. Those lookups are cached in-process for roughly five minutes.

tr.td: The resolved widget identifier used for the request.
Metadata describing the resolved widget when available.
